title: Colophon (v3)
surface: src/routes/colophon/+page.svelte (new — does not exist in v2)
summary: Methodology meta-receipt page. How this site was built — Blueprint pipeline applied to v3, stack details, predecessors and influences (Lovin, Lopopolo, Litt, Larson), deltas from v2, what's next.

strategy.decision: Build a /colophon as the meta-receipt for the methodology that produced the site. Surfaces the Blueprint 7-stage pipeline applied to v3, names predecessors and influences explicitly, lists v3-vs-v2 deltas.
strategy.why: Implements differentiation move 3 (methodology meta-receipt). No cohort site has self-referential methodology citation; building it is a cheap-to-execute trust signal that the practice walks its own talk. Per market-cohort.md, citing influences (Lopopolo, Willison, Larson) is a low-cost authority move in this cohort.
strategy.shipped: No equivalent. v2 has no colophon.
strategy.gap: v3 introduces a wholly new surface implementing differentiation move 3.
strategy.question: Footer placement of meta-receipt is per resolved choice (footer, not above the fold). The /colophon link in footer is consistent with that. Verify in Stage 4 that visitors who click into /colophon don't get a hard sell — the page should read as documentation, not marketing.

currentState.summary: v2 has no colophon or methodology meta-receipt surface.
